figures.caption: Figure 6: (a) Average maximum Q-value during training, indicating growing agent confidence. (b) Training loss (log scale), showing convergence.
Figure 7: Per-episode duration in seconds with a 10- episode moving average. The decreasing trend indicates increasing policy efficiency.
Figure 2: Analysis outcomes: (a) singularity loci, (b) manipulability map, (c) parameter atlas, (d) joint-angle trajectories along a representative path.
